key_themes: Robust FY2025 results with 30% revenue growth to $128.8m and 36% adjusted EBITDA growth
Successful diversification into digital wallets (+67%) and bundling (+71%)
Ongoing share buyback program with multiple April 2026 RNS transactions
Strong Buy analyst consensus with ~75% upside (targets ~310p from ~178p)
Unchanged medium-term guidance (>20% CAGR revenue, >30% EBITDA margins)
summary: Boku Inc. reported strong full-year 2025 results exceeding expectations, with 30% revenue growth driven by diversification beyond carrier billing into fast-growing digital wallets and bundling segments, alongside margin expansion and a robust cash position of ~$246m. Despite setting somewhat conservative near-term guidance earlier, the medium-term outlook remains positive and unchanged, supported by ongoing buybacks that signal board confidence. Analysts rate the stock a Strong Buy with targets around 310p (current ~178p as of mid-April 2026), contributing to positive overall sentiment even as social media investor discussion remains very limited.
sources: 15+ news articles, RNS announcements, and financial reports (Yahoo Finance, LSE, MarketBeat, Investing.com, Directorstalk), X searches returned sparse relevant discussion (~2 investor mentions out of reviewed posts); limited retail buzz
